events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Brian May Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Brian May! Guitar icon, songwriter, and astrophysicist – what a legend.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' iconic frontman, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Mick Jagger Birthday
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still got the moves like Jagger! Happy Birthday to the legendary Mick Jagger.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: MTV launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video.

angles.name: MTV Launch
angles.copy: On this day in 1981, MTV changed music forever. Remember the first video? It was The Buggles declaring 'Video Killed The Radio Star' – how ironic!

events.title: Oasis released Definitely Maybe
events.blurb: Oasis released their seminal debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, marking a pivotal moment in Britpop.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe Anniversary
angles.copy: Twenty-six years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and introduced us to the sound of a generation. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a defining moment of 1960s counterculture, began on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the legendary Woodstock Festival kicked off. Three days of peace, love, and music that truly defined a generation.

events.title: Tribute to Elvis Presley
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the passing of Elvis Presley, who would have been 91 this year.

angles.name: Elvis Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering The King. Today marks 49 years since the world lost Elvis Presley, a true icon who would have been 91. His music lives on.

events.title: Tribute to Jimi Hendrix
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of guitar legend Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix Tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix, who left us 56 years ago today. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to inspire.

events.title: The Beatles released Abbey Road
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic 'Abbey Road' album was released in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that unforgettable zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still one of the most famous in music history.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' formidable frontwoman, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 75th Birthday to the iconic Chrissie Hynde! Still rocking and still commanding the stage with that unmistakable voice.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis and Beady Eye frontman Liam Gallagher celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher Birthday
angles.copy: Our kid turns 54! Happy Birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher. Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon's Imagine UK single release
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic 'Imagine' single was re-released in the UK on October 24, 1975, to promote the compilation album 'Shaved Fish'.

angles.name: Imagine Single Anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-nine years since John Lennon's 'Imagine' single got its UK re-release. A timeless message that resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: Apple announced the first iPod
events.blurb: Apple announced the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: iPod Anniversary
angles.copy: Remember life before the iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple announced the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket' and changed everything.

events.title: Global James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks Global James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: It's Global James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007, the enduring icon of British cool since 'Dr. No' premiered in '62.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering John Lennon, who would have celebrated his 86th birthday today.

angles.name: John Lennon Birthday Tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary artistry and enduring message of John Lennon. Imagine that.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The legendary comedian, actor, and writer John Cleese celebrates his 87th birthday.

angles.name: John Cleese Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 87th Birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true titan of British comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released The White Album
events.blurb: The Beatles released their experimental double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', in the UK on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: White Album Anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-eight years since The Beatles delivered their sprawling, self-titled masterpiece, 'The White Album'. A truly eclectic collection of songs.
